commit_scope: Repair Hostinger web build by keeping the browser-facing Form kernel inside the web Docker build context.

commands: cd web && npm run test -- form-kernel-client.test.ts
local_validation.notes: The web build now resolves the browser kernel from web/lib/form-kernel/vendor instead of importing from ../../../experiments, matching the Hostinger Docker build context.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The existing /substrate/form Local TS kernel lane remains unchanged for visitors; the deployment build can now bundle it from inside web/.
test_flows: After deploy, open https://coherencycoin.com/substrate/form and run the Local TS kernel arithmetic binary.
Confirm Hostinger Auto Deploy completes its web build step.

phase_gate.notes: Local proof is complete; CI and deploy proof remain after push/PR.

evidence_refs: Hostinger Auto Deploy #26356869062 failed because web Docker context could not resolve ../../../experiments/form-kernel-ts/src/kernel.ts.
Vitest: web/tests/form-kernel-client.test.ts passed 2 tests after vendoring.
Next build: cd web && npm run build passed after vendoring.
